title: moraea nana
intro: Moraea nana, also known as the Dwarf Cape Lily or Button Lily, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Iridaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of saponins and iridoids. The health benefits of Moraea nana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also employed in traditional medicine to create poultices and ointments for topical application.
